cohorts.workforce: employed 18-74, age/sex/income post-stratified to Information-sector targets, enrollment tilt, one per household
cohorts.baseline: any adult 18-74 in member tracts, calibration weight only — the neighborhood-baseline toggle state

assumptions.targets_source: BLS CPS/OES 2024 Information-sector shapes, support-blended; PUMS_REPLACEABLE (see script)
assumptions.sex_coding: synth-pop: 1=male, 0=female (vendor/logic/enrich.py; gate caught the earlier 1/2 assumption 2026-07-21)

note: provenance reconstructed from logged gate after a KeyError in the provenance-write step (parquets+summary were complete); script fixed.
